question:
An AI Specialist at Universal Containers (UC) is tasked with creating a new custom prompt template to populate a field with generated output. UC enabled the Einstein Trust Layer to ensure AI Audit data is captured and monitored for adoption and possible enhancements.
Which prompt template type should the AI Specialist use and which consideration should they review?
options: Flex, and that Dynamic Fields is enabled
Field Generation, and that Dynamic Fields is enabled
Field Generation, and that Dynamic Forms is enabled
explanation: Para poblar un campo específico con contenido generado por IA en una página de registro, se debe usar una plantilla de 'Field Generation'. Además, es requisito indispensable que la página de registro esté configurada usando Dynamic Forms.

question: Universal Containers deploys a new Agentforce Service Agent into the company's website but is getting feedback that the Agentforce Service Agent is not providing answers to customer questions that are found in the company's Salesforce Knowledge articles. What is the most likely cause?
options: The Agentforce Service Agent user was not given the Allow View Knowledge permission set.
The Knowledge articles are not published in the correct language.
The Data Library was not connected to the correct Experience Cloud site.
explanation: La causa mas probable es que el usuario del Agentforce Service Agent no tenga el permission set Allow View Knowledge. Sin este permiso, el agente no puede acceder ni recuperar articulos de Knowledge para responder preguntas.

question: During configuration, Universal Containers (UC) forgot to grant Knowledge access to the Agentforce Service Agent. Which permission must UC add for the agent to interact with Knowledge articles and answer customer questions effectively?
options: Allow View Knowledge and Run Flows
Access Knowledge records and fields, and Allow View Knowledge
Access Custom Objects and Manage External Users
explanation: Para que el agente pueda interactuar con articulos de Knowledge, necesita tanto 'Access Knowledge records and fields' (acceso de lectura a los registros y campos de Knowledge) como 'Allow View Knowledge' (permiso para ver la base de conocimiento). Ambos son necesarios para una interaccion completa con Knowledge.

question:
An AI Specialist is tasked with configuring a generative model to create personalized sales emails using customer data stored in Salesforce. The AI Specialist has already fine-tuned a large language model (LLM) on the OpenAI platform. Security and data privacy are critical concerns for the client.
How should the AI Specialist integrate the custom LLM into Salesforce?
options: Add the fine-tuned LLM in Einstein Studio Model Builder.
Enable model endpoint on OpenAl and make callouts to the model to generate emails.
Create an application of the custom LLM and embed it in Sales Cloud via iFrame.
explanation: Para integrar un LLM personalizado fine-tuneado en OpenAI a Salesforce de forma segura, se debe usar Einstein Studio Model Builder para registrar y gestionar el modelo externo. Hacer callouts directos a OpenAI o incrustar con iFrame no proporciona las garantías de seguridad y control del Trust Layer.

question: An Agentforce Specialist is assisting Universal Containers with troubleshooting an agent. The Agentforce Specialist notices that the agent is not using topic actions in the desired sequence, causing inconsistent outcomes. Which technique should the Agentforce Specialist recommend to ensure deterministic control over the order in which actions are executed?
options: Specify the large language model (LLM) provider and version.
Specify custom variables and filters.
Specify the order of actions.
explanation: Para asegurar control deterministico sobre el orden de ejecucion de acciones, se deben usar variables personalizadas y filtros condicionales. Los filtros en las acciones garantizan que cada accion solo se ejecute cuando las condiciones previas se cumplan, creando una secuencia determinista independiente del razonamiento del LLM.

question:
An AI Specialist built a Field Generation prompt template that worked for many records, but users are reporting random failures with token limit errors. 
What is the cause of the random nature of this error?
options: The number of tokens generated by the dynamic nature of the prompt template will vary by record.
The template type needs to be switched to Flex to accommodate the variable amount of tokens generated by the prompt grounding.
The number of tokens that can be processed by the LLM varies with total user demand.
explanation: Los errores de token limit son aleatorios porque el número de tokens generados varía según el contenido dinámico del registro procesado; algunos registros tienen más datos que otros. El template no es el problema ni la demanda del LLM; es la variabilidad inherente de los datos de cada registro.

question: Which element in the Omni-Channel flow should be used to connect the flow with the agent?
options: Transfer to Agent element.
Assign Work element.
Route Work Action.
explanation: Route Work Action es el elemento correcto en el flujo de Omni-Channel para conectar el flujo con el agente y dirigir el trabajo al agente apropiado segun las reglas de enrutamiento configuradas.

question: An Agentforce Specialist is setting up a new org and needs to ensure that users can create and execute prompt templates. The specialist is unsure which roles are necessary. Which permission sets should be assigned?
options: Prompt Template Manager for creating templates and Prompt Template User for executing templates.
Prompt Template Manager for creating templates and Data Cloud Admin for executing templates.
Data Cloud Admin for creating templates and Prompt Template User for executing templates.
explanation: Prompt Template Manager crea y administra plantillas; Prompt Template User permite ejecutar las plantillas. Asignar ambos es la práctica de permisos correcta para creación y ejecución.

question: A service manager wants to use Salesforce Prompt Builder to help agents summarize customer case notes after a support call. The summary should: capture the customer's issue, troubleshooting steps taken, and next actions; be no longer than five sentences; use plain language; and if no next action is identified, explicitly state 'No next action required.' Which prompt template follows Salesforce prompt design best practices?
options: Role: You are an experienced support agent. Task: Summarize the case notes. Context: Include customer issue, troubleshooting steps, and next actions. Constraints: Limit to 5 sentences, use plain language, and if no next action is found, state 'No next action required.' Format: Use numbered sentences for clarity.

Role: You are a support agent writing a case summary. Task: Provide a professional summary. Context: Include customer issue, steps taken, and next actions if available. Constraints: No strict sentence limit, but use plain language. If no next action is found, leave it out. Format: Use paragraphs.

Role: You are a case documentation assistant. Task: Write a summary of the support call. Context: Always describe the customer issue, troubleshooting, and resolution details. Constraints: The summary should be comprehensive and professional, but there is no limit on length or language style.
explanation: La opcion A sigue las mejores practicas de diseno de prompts de Salesforce: define claramente el rol, la tarea, el contexto, las restricciones especificas (limite de oraciones, lenguaje sencillo, manejo del caso sin accion), y el formato. Las otras opciones tienen restricciones vagas o incompletas que no garantizan la calidad del output.

question: Universal Containers (UC) has configured a data library and wants to restrict indexing of knowledge articles to articles which are only publicly available in their knowledge base. UC also wants the agent to link sources that the large language model (LLM) grounded its response on. Which settings should help UC with this?
options: In the data library setting window, under Knowledge Settings, enable Use Public Knowledge Article and select Show sources.
In the data library setting window, under Knowledge Settings, enable Use Public Knowledge Article. It is not possible to display articles that the LLM grounded its response in.
Use Data Categories to categorize publicly available articles to index. Sources are automatically displayed when knowledge articles are categorized as Public.
explanation: En la configuracion de la Data Library, bajo Knowledge Settings, se puede habilitar 'Use Public Knowledge Article' para restringir la indexacion a articulos publicos, y 'Show sources' para que el agente enlace las fuentes en las que el LLM baso su respuesta.

question: In Model Playground, which hyperparameters of an existing Salesforce-enabled foundational model can an AI Specialist change?
options: Temperature, Frequency Penalty, Presence Penalty
Temperature, Top-k sampling, Presence Penalty
Temperature, Frequency Penalty, Output Tokens
explanation: En el Model Playground, los Especialistas en IA pueden ajustar hiperparámetros clave como la Temperatura (Temperature), la Penalización de Frecuencia (Frequency Penalty) y la Penalización de Presencia (Presence Penalty) para afinar el comportamiento del modelo.

question: Which scenario best illustrates the use of Model Context Protocol (MCP) in an enterprise AI deployment?
options: A legal assistant agent using MCP to dynamically find a document classification API to analyze case files
A customer service agent engaging another agent in real-time conversation to resolve tickets
A sales agent discovering other agents' capabilities using Agent Cards
explanation: MCP se ilustra mejor con un agente que lo usa para descubrir y conectarse dinamicamente a herramientas y APIs externas, como una API de clasificacion de documentos. La opcion B describe A2A y la opcion C describe el uso de Agent Cards, que son parte del protocolo A2A para descubrimiento de capacidades entre agentes.

question: Universal Containers (UC) configured a new PDF file ingestion in Data Cloud with all the required fields, and also created the mapping and the search index. UC is now setting up the individual retriever and notices a required field is missing. How should UC resolve this?
options: Create a new custom Data Cloud object that includes the desired field.
Update the search index to include the desired field.
Update the default retriever to include the desired field.
explanation: Para resolver un campo requerido faltante, actualice la search index para incluir el campo. El retriever depende de índices configurados; sin el campo indexado, no puede devolver datos necesarios.

question: What is the main purpose of Prompt Builder?
options: A tool for developers to use in Visual Studio Code that creates prompts for Apex programming, assisting developers in writing code more efficiently.
A tool that enables companies to create reusable prompts for large language models (LLMs), bringing generative AI responses to their flow of work
A tool within Salesforce offering real-time Al-powered suggestions and guidance to users, Improving productivity and decision-making.
explanation: El propósito principal de Prompt Builder es permitir a las empresas crear, probar y gestionar plantillas de prompts reutilizables para LLMs, integrando las respuestas de la IA generativa directamente en los flujos de trabajo de Salesforce.

question: Universal Containers' service team wants to customize the standard case summary response from Agentforce. What should the Agentforce Specialist do to achieve this?
options: Customize the standard Record Summary template for the Case object.
Summarize the Case with a standard agent action.
Create a custom Record Summary prompt template for the Case object.
explanation: La opción correcta es crear un 'Record Summary prompt template' personalizado para el objeto Caso. Las acciones de resumen estándar no se pueden editar directamente, por lo que se debe usar Prompt Builder para adaptar la salida de la IA a los requerimientos del equipo.

question: A developer is using the Salesforce CLI to deploy agent components from a sandbox to production. They recently made changes to several topics, instructions, and actions. Which metadata component should the developer include in their package.xml file that contains all of the topics and actions an agent will interact with?
options: genAiPlannerBundle
EinsteinAiPlannerBundle
BotBundle
explanation: genAiPlannerBundle es el componente de metadatos que contiene todos los topics y acciones con los que interactua un agente de Agentforce. Es el paquete correcto a incluir en el package.xml cuando se despliegan cambios a topics, instrucciones y acciones del agente via Salesforce CLI.

question:
An AI Specialist wants to ground a new prompt template with the User related list.
What should the AI Specialist consider?
options: The User related list should have View All access.
The User related list needs to be included on the record page.
The User related list is not supported in prompt templates.
explanation: El objeto Usuario (User) y sus listas relacionadas no están soportadas actualmente para ser utilizadas directamente como listas relacionadas (related lists) en el grounding de las plantillas de prompt (prompt templates).

question: An Agentforce Specialist wants to ensure their custom agent action performs as expected in conversations. What should the Agentforce Specialist focus on when creating action instructions?
options: Write concise agent action instructions and test in Agentforce Builder.
Ensure the agent action label matches the utterance's intent.
Include comprehensive detailed descriptions and perform smoke testing.
explanation: La mejor practica es escribir instrucciones de accion concisas y claras, y probarlas iterativamente en Agentforce Builder. Las instrucciones demasiado largas o detalladas pueden confundir al LLM; la concision y las pruebas iterativas son clave para un comportamiento correcto del agente.

question: When is the Agent-to-Agent (A2A) protocol an appropriate communication choice?
options: When agents need to invoke third-party APIs
When agents need to access tools
When agents need to collaborate
explanation: El protocolo Agent-to-Agent (A2A) es apropiado cuando los agentes necesitan colaborar entre si, delegando tareas o compartiendo contexto. Para invocar APIs de terceros se usa MCP, y para acceder a herramientas tambien se usa MCP. A2A es especificamente para colaboracion y comunicacion entre agentes.

question: Where should the AI Specialist go to add/update actions assigned to a Agentforce or copilot ?
options: Agentforce or copilot  Actions page, the record page for the Agentforce or copilot  action, or the Agentforce or copilot  Action Library tab
Agentforce or copilot  Actions page or Global Actions
Agentforce or copilot  Detail page, Global Actions, or the record page for the Agentforce or copilot  action
explanation: Las acciones de Agentforce pueden añadirse, actualizarse y gestionarse desde la página de Acciones del Copilot/Agente, desde la página del registro de la acción en sí, o desde la pestaña de la Biblioteca de Acciones (Action Library).

question: Universal Containers (UC) wants to enable its sales team to use AI to suggest recommended products from its catalog. Which type of prompt template should UC use?
options: Record summary prompt template.
Email generation prompt template.
Flex prompt template.
explanation: Un Flex Template es el tipo correcto para sugerir productos recomendados ya que permite combinar datos de multiples objetos (catalogo de productos, historial del cliente) como inputs independientes para generar recomendaciones personalizadas.

question: Universal Containers (UC) wants to enable its sales team with automatic post-call visibility into mention of competitors, products, and other custom phrases. Which feature should the company use to enable the sales team?
options: Call Insights
Call Explorer
Call Summaries
explanation: Call Insights provee visibilidad post-llamada sobre menciones de competidores, productos y frases personalizadas para mejorar la captación y seguimiento de oportunidades.

question: After a successful implementation of Agentforce Sales Agent with sales users, Universal Containers now aims to deploy it to the service team. Which key consideration should the Agentforce Specialist keep in mind for this deployment?
options: Assign the Agentforce for Service permission to the Service Cloud users.
Assign the standard service actions to Agentforce Service Agent.
Review and test standard and custom Agent topics and actions for Service Center use cases.
explanation: Al desplegar el agente al equipo de servicio, la consideracion clave es revisar y probar los topics y acciones estandar y personalizados para los casos de uso del Service Center. Los topics y acciones disenados para ventas pueden no ser apropiados o suficientes para los flujos de trabajo de servicio.

question:
An AI Specialist is tasked with creating a prompt template for a sales team. The template needs to generate a summary of all related opportunities for a given Account.
Which grounding technique should the AI Specialist use to include data from the related list of opportunities in the prompt template?
options: Use formula fields to reference the Einstein related list of opportunities.
Use merge fields to reference the default related list of opportunities.
Use the merge fields to reference a custom related list of opportunities.
explanation: Para incluir datos de la lista relacionada de oportunidades en un prompt template, se deben usar merge fields que referencien la related list de oportunidades predeterminada. Las fórmulas no son el mecanismo correcto para este tipo de grounding dinámico con datos relacionados.

question:
An AI Specialist wants to include data from the response of external service invocation (REST API callout) into the prompt template. 
How should the AI Specialist meet this requirement?
options: Convert the JSON to an XML merge field.
Use External Service Record merge fields.
Use “Add Prompt Instructions” flow element.
explanation: Al usar un Flujo de Prompt Activado por Plantilla (Template-Triggered Prompt Flow), puedes realizar llamadas a API REST externas (callouts) y añadir los datos o el JSON recuperado al prompt usando el elemento de flujo 'Agregar Instrucciones de Prompt' (Add Prompt Instructions).

question: Coral Cloud Resorts (CCR) wants to configure its agent so that booking actions are only available when a customer's membership tier is 'Premium' or 'Elite'. This business rule must be enforced deterministically. What should CCR implement?
options: Set up custom validation rules on the underlying booking objects to prevent non-eligible customers from completing bookings.
Configure topic instructions that clearly state booking actions should only be used for Premium or Elite customers and include examples.
Create a context variable mapped to the customer's membership tier field, then add a conditional filter on MembershipTier.
explanation: Para aplicar reglas de negocio de forma determinista, se debe crear una context variable mapeada al campo de nivel de membresia y agregar un filtro condicional en la accion de booking. Depender de las topic instructions no es deterministico ya que el LLM puede no seguirlas consistentemente.

question:
When configuring a prompt template, an AI Specialist previews the results of the prompt template they've written. They see two distinct text outputs: Resolution and Response.
Which information does the Resolution text provide?
options: It shows the full text that is sent to the Trust Layer.
It shows the response from the LLM based on the sample record.
It shows which sensitive data is masked before it is sent to the LLM.
explanation: The new answer is correct because the 'Resolution' text in Prompt Builder shows the fully resolved prompt text (including merged data) that is sent to the LLM via the Trust Layer. The original answer was incorrect because the 'Response' section, not the 'Resolution', shows the LLM's generated response.

question: Universal Containers wants to allow its service agents to query the current fulfillment status of an order with natural language. There is an existing autolaunched flow to query the information from Oracle ERP, which is the system of record for the order fulfillment process. How should an Agentforce Specialist apply the power of conversational AI to this use case?
options: Create a custom Agent action which calls a flow.
Create a Flex prompt template in Prompt Builder.
Configure the Integration Flow Standard Action in Agent Builder.
explanation: Use un custom Agent action para invocar el flow autolaunch desde ERP.

question: After configuring and saving a Salesforce Agentforce Data Library (regardless of the data source), which components are automatically created and available in Data Cloud?
options: A data pipeline, an indexing engine, and a query processor.
A data connector, an analytics dashboard, and a workflow rule.
A data stream, a search index, and a retriever.
explanation: Crea un data stream, search index y retriever automáticamente.

question: Universal Containers has a custom Agent action calling a flow to retrieve the real-time status of an order from the order fulfillment system. What should the Agentforce Specialist consider about the running user's data access?
options: The flow must have the 'with sharing' permission selected in the advanced settings for the permissions, field-level security, and sharing settings to be respected.

The custom action adheres to the permissions, field-level security, and sharing settings configured in the flow. The Agent will always run flows in system mode so the running user's data access will not affect the data returned.
explanation: Para que se respeten los permisos, FLS y sharing rules del usuario en ejecucion, el flow invocado debe estar configurado para ejecutarse con 'With Sharing' (User Context). La opcion marcada previamente es incorrecta porque los agentes no ejecutan siempre los flows en system mode; el contexto de ejecucion depende de la configuracion del propio flow.

question: Cloud Kicks (CK) is launching a new partner portal on Experience Cloud. CK wants to provide partners with an agent that can answer questions about product specifications from the knowledge base and allow them to submit a new Lead. The agent must be accessible only to authenticated partner users on the portal. Which agent type is required to meet this scenario?
options: Sales Agent
Commerce Agent
Service Agent
explanation: Un Service Agent es el tipo correcto para este escenario: responder preguntas basadas en Knowledge y permitir enviar Leads en un portal de Experience Cloud para usuarios autenticados. Service Agent soporta integracion con Knowledge y acciones de CRM como creacion de Leads.

question:
Universal Containers (UC) is experimenting with using public Generative AI models and is familiar with the language required to get the information it needs. However, it can be time consuming for both UC's sales and service reps to type in the prompt to get the information they need, and ensure prompt consistency.
Which Salesforce feature should a Salesforce AI Specialist recommend to address these concerns?
options: Einstein Recommendation Builder
Einstein Agentforce or copilot  Action: Query Records
Einstein Prompt Builder and Prompt Templates
explanation: Einstein Prompt Builder con Prompt Templates es la solución para estandarizar y reutilizar prompts complejos, evitando que los usuarios tengan que escribirlos manualmente cada vez. Esto garantiza consistencia en los prompts y ahorra tiempo a los equipos de ventas y servicio.

question: What is automatically created when a custom search index is created in Data Cloud?
options: A retriever that shares the name of the custom search index.
A data stream and a data lake object.
A prompt template linked to the search index.
explanation: Cuando se crea un search index personalizado en Data Cloud, automaticamente se crea un retriever con el mismo nombre. Este retriever puede usarse directamente en prompts y agentes para realizar busquedas sobre el indice.

question: What is the purpose of applying filters in a custom retriever configuration?
options: Filters narrow the search results by applying up to 10 conditions based on fields defined in the search index, thereby enhancing the relevancy of the content returned.
Filters automatically encrypt and mask sensitive fields in the search index to ensure that only non-confidential information is retrieved for public queries.
Filters reformat and aggregate multiple documents into a single summary output to streamline and unify retriever output for more efficient and accurate AI grounding.
explanation: Los filtros en un retriever personalizado limitan los resultados de busqueda aplicando hasta 10 condiciones basadas en campos del search index, mejorando la relevancia del contenido retornado. No cifran campos ni reformatean documentos; su funcion es acotar el scope de busqueda.

question:
Universal Containers' service team wants to customize the standard case summary response from Einstein Agentforce or copilot .
What should the AI Specialist do to achieve this?
options: Customize the standard Record Summary template for the Case object,
Summarize the Case with a standard Agentforce or copilot  action.
Create a custom Record Summary prompt template for the Case object.
explanation: Para asignar acciones a un agente, primero se debe asignar la acción a un Topic en la página de detalles de Agent Actions. Action Builder no es el lugar correcto y asignar directamente en Agent Builder omite el paso requerido de asociación con Topics.

question: An Agentforce Specialist is tasked with creating a prompt template for a sales team. The template needs to generate a summary of all related opportunities for a given Account. Which grounding technique should the Agentforce Specialist use to include data from the related list of opportunities in the prompt template?
options: Use formula fields to reference the related list.
Use merge fields to reference the default related list of opportunities.
Use merge fields to reference a custom related list.
explanation: Use merge fields para referenciar el related list predeterminado de oportunidades.

question:
Universal Containers wants to reduce overall agent handling time by minimizing the time spent typing routine answers for common questions in-chat, and reducing the post-chat analysis by suggesting values for case fields.
Which combination of Einstein for Service features enables this effort?
options: Einstein Service Replies and Work Summaries
Einstein Reply Recommendations and Case Summaries
Einstein Reply Recommendations and Case Classification
explanation: Para reducir el tiempo escribiendo respuestas rutinarias en chat y sugerir valores para los campos del caso post-chat, la combinación adecuada es usar Recomendaciones de Respuestas (Reply Recommendations) para el chat y Clasificación de Casos (Case Classification) para rellenar los campos.

question: What is the role of the large language model (LLM) in understanding intent and executing an Agent Action?
options: Determine a user's topic access and sort actions by priority to be executed
Identify the best matching topic and actions and correct order of execution
Find similar requested topics and provide the actions that need to be executed
explanation: El LLM identifica el topic y la acción correcta en base a la intención del usuario, y ordena los pasos para ejecutar la respuesta adecuada.

question: Which scenario best illustrates the use of Model Context Protocol (MCP) in an enterprise AI deployment?
options: A legal assistant agent using MCP to dynamically find a document classification API to analyze case files
A customer service agent engaging another agent in real-time conversation to resolve tickets
A sales agent discovering other agents' capabilities using Agent Cards
explanation: MCP se ilustra mejor con un agente que lo usa para descubrir y conectarse dinamicamente a herramientas y APIs externas, como una API de clasificacion de documentos. La opcion B describe A2A y la opcion C describe el uso de Agent Cards, que son parte del protocolo A2A para descubrimiento de capacidades entre agentes.

question: Universal Containers (UC) currently tracks Leads with a custom object. UC is preparing to implement the Sales Development Representative (SDR) Agent. Which consideration should UC keep in mind?
options: Agentforce SDR only works with the standard Lead object.
Agentforce SDR only works on Opportunities.
Agentforce SDR only supports custom objects associated with Accounts.
explanation: SDR Agent solo funciona con el objeto estándar Lead.

question: What is a Salesforce Agentforce Specialist able to configure in Data Masking within the Einstein Trust Layer?
options: The profiles exempt from masking
The encryption keys for masking
The privacy data entities to be masked
explanation: En Data Masking dentro del Einstein Trust Layer, el Agentforce Specialist puede configurar las entidades de datos privados que deben ser enmascaradas (como emails, telefonos, SSNs). No se configuran claves de cifrado ni perfiles exentos en esta seccion especifica.

question: An administrator wants to check the response of the Flex prompt template they've built, but the preview button is greyed out. What is the reason for this?
options: The prompt has not been saved and activated.
The records related to the prompt have not been selected.
A merge field has not been inserted in the prompt.
explanation: In Prompt Builder, the preview button remains greyed out until the administrator selects the specific records related to the prompt to evaluate the merge fields and generate the preview.

question: An Agentforce Specialist wants to troubleshoot an agent that is hallucinating weblinks. The agent has an action that uses a prompt template, which is using a knowledge retriever, to generate the output text. Which process is appropriate to find the root cause of the hallucination behavior?
options: Examine the topic name and classification description for hallucination guardrails.
Examine the prompt instructions and contents of the chunks shown in the resolved prompt output.
Examine the topic instructions and ensure the word 'ALWAYS' is used in the hallucination guardrails.
explanation: Para encontrar la causa raiz de alucinaciones de weblinks, se deben examinar las instrucciones del prompt y el contenido de los chunks mostrados en el output del prompt resuelto. Los chunks revelan que datos exactos se estan usando para grounding, lo que permite identificar si el contenido fuente contiene links incorrectos o si el LLM los esta inventando.

question: Universal Containers (UC) is creating a new custom prompt template to populate a field with generated output. UC enabled the Einstein Trust Layer to ensure AI Audit data is captured and monitored for adoption and possible enhancements. Which prompt template type should UC use, and what additional configuration is required?
options: Sales Email, and that the object is associated with a campaign.
Field Generation, and that Dynamic Forms is enabled.
Record Summary, and that the Lightning page is updated to Dynamic Forms.
explanation: Para poblar un campo con output generado por IA, se debe usar Field Generation como tipo de template, y ademas habilitar Dynamic Forms en la pagina Lightning donde reside el campo. Sin Dynamic Forms, el icono de generacion de campo (sparkle icon) no aparecera.

question:
Universal Containers (UC) wants to create a new Sales Email prompt template in Prompt Builder using the "Save As" function. However, UC notices that the new template produces different results compared to the standard Sales Email prompt due to missing hyperparameters.
What should UC do to ensure the new prompt template produces results comparable to the standard Sales Email prompts?
options: Use Model Playground to create a model configuration with the specified parameters.
Manually add the hyperparameters to the new template.
Revert to using the standard template without modifications.
explanation: Al usar 'Save As' en Prompt Builder, los hiperparámetros del template original no se copian automáticamente al nuevo template. La solución es agregar manualmente los hiperparámetros al nuevo template para que produzca resultados comparables al estándar.

question: Universal Containers wants to automatically populate the Description field on the Account object with AI-generated content. Which prompt template type should be used?
options: Sales Email
Flex
Field Generation
explanation: Field Generation es el tipo de template correcto para poblar automaticamente un campo especifico (Description) en un objeto (Account) con contenido generado por IA. Esta disenado exactamente para este caso de uso: generar contenido para campos individuales de registros de Salesforce.

question: What is a key benefit of the Agent-to-Agent (A2A) protocol?
options: Provides a standardized framework for cross-vendor agent discovery and communication
Allows auto-onboard third-party agents without additional contracts, trust scores, or shared identity controls
Provides a standardized runtime engine for internal agent discovery and communication
explanation: The original answer incorrectly claimed the A2A protocol is for 'internal' agent discovery. The correct answer is that the key benefit of the A2A protocol is providing a standardized framework for 'cross-vendor' agent discovery and communication, allowing Salesforce agents to collaborate seamlessly with third-party external agents.

question: Universal Containers (UC) has a legacy system that needs to integrate with Salesforce. UC wishes to create a digest of account action plans using the generative API feature. Which API service should UC use to meet this requirement?
options: REST API
Metadata API
SOAP API
explanation: Para generar digest con la API generativa, use REST API. Metadata y SOAP son usados para metadatos y SOAP integration, no para generación de contenido AI.

question: What is the main benefit of using a Knowledge article in an Agentforce Data Library?
options: It provides a structured, searchable repository of approved documents so the agent can retrieve reliable information for each inquiry.
Only the retriever for Knowledge articles allows agents to access Knowledge from both inside the platform and on a customer's website.
The retriever for Knowledge articles has better accuracy and performance than the default retriever.
explanation: Knowledge articles ofrecen repositorio estructurado y confiable para retrieval.

question: What is an Agentforce Specialist able to do when the ‘Enrich event logs with conversation data’ setting in the Agentforce configuration is enabled?
options: Generate detailed reports on all Agent conversations over any time period.
View the user click path that led to each Agent action.
View session data including user input and Agent responses for sessions over the past 7 days.
explanation: Permite ver datos de sesión con entradas y respuestas de los últimos 7 días.

question: Which scenario best demonstrates when an Agentforce Data Library is most useful for improving an AI agent's response accuracy?
options: When data is being retrieved from Snowflake using zero-copy for vectorization and retrieval.
When the AI agent must provide answers based on a curated set of policy documents that are stored, regularly updated, and indexed in the data library.
When the AI agent needs to combine data from disparate sources based on mutually common data.
explanation: Data Library es ideal para documentos de políticas curados y indexados para grounding.

question: Universal Containers wants to reduce overall customer support handling time by minimizing the time spent typing routine answers for common questions in-chat and reducing post-chat analysis by suggesting values for case fields. Which AI features should UC implement?
options: Einstein Reply Recommendations and Case Classification.
Einstein Service Replies and Einstein Work Summaries.
Einstein Case Summaries and Einstein Knowledge Recommendations.
explanation: Einstein Reply Recommendations sugiere respuestas para preguntas frecuentes en chat, mientras que Case Classification sugiere automaticamente valores para los campos del caso, reduciendo tanto el tiempo de manejo como el analisis post-chat.

question:
Universal Containers (UC) has a mature Salesforce org with a lot of data in cases and Knowledge articles. UC is concerned that there are many legacy fields, with data that might not be applicable for Einstein AI to draft accurate email responses.
Which solution should UC use to ensure Einstein AI can draft responses from a defined data source?
options: Service AI Grounding
Work Summaries
Service Replies
explanation: Service AI Grounding permite definir y limitar de qué fuentes de datos específicas (como campos concretos de Casos y Knowledge) extrae información la IA de Einstein para redactar respuestas, reduciendo el ruido de campos heredados o irrelevantes.

question: Universal Containers is building a digital shopping assistant that needs to dynamically generate product recommendations using information from the company's external product recommendation predictive model through APIs. Which Agentforce capability should make it easier for the agent to consume the external product recommendation tool?
options: Model Context Protocol (MCP)
Hugging Face
Agent-to-Agent (A2A) protocol
explanation: Model Context Protocol (MCP) es la capacidad de Agentforce que permite al agente descubrir y consumir dinamicamente herramientas y APIs externas, como un modelo predictivo de recomendaciones de productos. MCP facilita la integracion con herramientas externas de forma estandarizada sin necesidad de codificacion custom.

question: Universal Containers (UC) is implementing generative AI and wants to leverage a prompt template to provide personalized product recommendations to website visitors based on their browsing history. Which initial step should UC take to ensure the chatbot can deliver accurate recommendations?
options: Design universal product recommendations.
Write a response script for the chatbot.
Collect and analyze browsing data.
explanation: El paso inicial correcto es recopilar y analizar los datos de navegacion, ya que estos son la fuente de grounding que permitira al prompt template generar recomendaciones personalizadas. Sin datos de navegacion disponibles y analizados, el template no tiene contexto para personalizar las recomendaciones.

question:
An AI Specialist needs to create a Sales Email with a custom prompt template. They need to ground on the following data:
- Opportunity Products
- Events near the customer
- Tone and voice examples
How should the AI Specialist obtain related items?
options: Call a prompt initiated flow to fetch and ground the required data.
Create a flex template that takes the records in question as inputs.
Utilize a standard email template and manually insert the required data fields.
explanation: Llamar a un flow iniciado por prompt permite obtener datos relacionados como Opportunity Products, eventos externos y ejemplos de tono que no están directamente disponibles como merge fields estándar. Un Flex template requiere que los objetos sean inputs directos, no datos relacionados complejos.

question: Universal Containers (UC) is preparing to use the Agentforce Testing Center to ensure the reliability of a new agent. UC has a CSV file with test cases and is reviewing the documentation to understand best practices and limitations. Which best practice should the company follow to avoid modifying CRM data while running tests in the Testing Center?
options: Limit the number of test cases to 50 per test to minimize data changes.
Use the Testing Center only in the sandbox environment.
Run tests in the production environment to ensure real time data accuracy.
explanation: Para garantizar que las pruebas del agente no alteren ni corrompan los datos reales de los clientes (datos de producción de CRM), la mejor práctica y recomendación estricta de Salesforce es ejecutar el Testing Center exclusivamente en un entorno Sandbox. Esto permite evaluar acciones y flujos sin riesgo de impacto operativo real.

question: Universal Containers needs to bring individual customer warranties from an external system into Data Cloud. They want Agentforce to return warranty-related responses only for accounts whose warranty status is active. Which search approach should the Agentforce Specialist configure?
options: Depend on Agentforce instructions to enforce warranty constraints and include only WarrantyStatus = Active results.
Store the account's warranty status in an Agentforce custom variable to dynamically filter warranties during retrieval.
Use Hybrid Search and apply pre-filtering in a new custom retriever for matching accounts where the WarrantyStatus = Active field.
explanation: Usar Hybrid Search con pre-filtering en un retriever personalizado para WarrantyStatus = Active garantiza que solo se recuperen garantias activas de forma determinista. Depender de instrucciones del agente no es suficientemente confiable para filtros de negocio criticos.

question: What is an AI Specialist able to do when the “Enrich event logs with conversation data" setting in Einstein Agentforce or copilot  is enabled?
options: View the user click path that led to each Agentforce or copilot  action.
View session data including user Input and Agentforce or copilot  responses for sessions over the past 7 days.
Generate details reports on all Agentforce or copilot  conversations over any time period.
explanation: Al habilitar 'Enrich event logs with conversation data', el especialista puede ver los datos de sesión incluyendo inputs del usuario y respuestas del agente de los últimos 7 días. No se puede ver el click path completo del usuario ni generar informes históricos ilimitados con esta configuración.

question: Universal Containers (UC) uses a file upload-based data library and custom prompt to support AI-driven training content. However, users report that the AI frequently returns outdated documents. How should UC ensure only recent documents are retrieved?
options: Delete outdated documents manually from the data library each week.
Configure a custom retriever that includes a filter condition limiting retrieval to documents updated within a defined recent period.
Re-upload all documents every week to reset the index.
explanation: Configurar un retriever personalizado con un filtro de fecha de actualizacion garantiza que solo se recuperen documentos recientes. Esta es la forma mas eficiente y automatizada de mantener la relevancia del contenido sin intervencion manual.
